name: Blokus Duo
author: Bernard Tavitian (Sekkoia 2005; Mattel) / AGP
description: The two-player Blokus, on a 14x14 board. Each player holds the same 21 pieces — every free polyomino of size 1 to 5 (1 monomino, 1 domino, 2 trominoes, 5 tetrominoes, 12 pentominoes; rotations and reflections both allowed). Your first piece must cover your starting point; every later piece must touch one of your own pieces at a corner and must never share an edge with your own colour. Pieces of different colours may touch freely. A blocked player passes; the game ends when both are blocked. Score -1 per remaining unit square, +15 for placing all 21 pieces, +5 more if your last piece was the single square. Highest score wins.
